name: K. Preethi
testimonial: PSR's IT Department gave me an incredible foundation. The Anna University curriculum combined with practical lab work and placement training prepared me well for my career at Zoho.

name: S. Ravi Kumar
testimonial: The hands-on lab sessions and project-based learning at PSR IT department gave me a strong edge. The placement cell's support was outstanding.

name: M. Deepa
testimonial: The research-oriented approach of our faculty, especially in AI/ML, sparked my passion for technology. The eco-friendly campus and supportive environment made PSR a great place to learn.

name: R. Suresh
testimonial: From the GATE coaching classes to the placement drives, PSR IT Department covered every aspect needed for a successful career in the IT industry.

name: P. Kavitha
testimonial: The IT department at PSR provided the perfect blend of academics and practical skills. From college projects to Wipro — the journey has been wonderful.

name: A. Venkatesan
testimonial: PSR Engineering College's autonomous curriculum, combined with the NAAC A-grade standards, ensured we received world-class education right here in Sivakasi.
